requirement_topic.en: MEW Grid and Project Connection for BESS — 240/415 V, 50 Hz, IEC 62933, and Project-Specific Requirements
requirement_topic.zh: MEW BESS并网及项目接入——240/415 V、50 Hz、IEC 62933及项目专属要求
requirement_topic.zht: MEW BESS併網及項目接入——240/415 V、50 Hz、IEC 62933及項目專屬要求

summary.en: The Ministry of Electricity, Water and Renewable Energy (MEW) is the relevant Kuwait authority for electricity supply and grid/project engagement. Kuwait low-voltage supply is commonly specified as 240 V single-phase and 415 V three-phase at 50 Hz. Publicly accessible MEW material confirming a standalone technical specification for grid-connected stationary BESS was not identified as of the dataset date. For utility-scale, commercial, and industrial BESS, grid and protection requirements should therefore be treated as project-specific MEW and project-owner requirements. Project documents may call for IEC 62933 series evidence, including IEC 62933-5-2 for electrochemical energy storage system safety and IEC 62933-2-1 for unit parameters and test methods. PCS settings, protection thresholds, anti-islanding behavior, reactive power functions, and SCADA interfaces must be confirmed with MEW and the project owner before procurement and commissioning.
summary.zh: 科威特电力水务和可再生能源部（MEW）是电力供应及电网/项目沟通的相关主管机关。科威特低压供电通常为单相240 V、三相415 V、50 Hz。截至本数据集日期，尚未发现MEW公开发布专门针对并网固定式BESS的技术规格。对于公用事业规模、商业和工业BESS，应将并网和保护要求视为MEW及项目业主的项目专属要求。项目文件可能要求IEC 62933系列证据，包括用于电化学储能系统安全的IEC 62933-5-2，以及用于单元参数和测试方法的IEC 62933-2-1。PCS设置、保护阈值、防孤岛行为、无功功能和SCADA接口，须在采购和调试前与MEW及项目业主确认。
summary.zht: 科威特電力水務和可再生能源部（MEW）是電力供應及電網/項目溝通的相關主管機關。科威特低壓供電通常為單相240 V、三相415 V、50 Hz。截至本數據集日期，尚未發現MEW公開發布專門針對併網固定式BESS的技術規格。對於公用事業規模、商業和工業BESS，應將併網和保護要求視為MEW及項目業主的項目專屬要求。項目文件可能要求IEC 62933系列證據，包括用於電化學儲能系統安全的IEC 62933-5-2，以及用於單元參數和測試方法的IEC 62933-2-1。PCS設定、保護閾值、防孤島行為、無功功能和SCADA接口，須在採購和調試前與MEW及項目業主確認。

standards_or_laws: Ministry of Electricity, Water and Renewable Energy (MEW) — Kuwait electricity authority for project and grid engagement
Kuwait grid context — 240 V single-phase, 415 V three-phase, 50 Hz
IEC 62933-2-1 — Electrical Energy Storage Systems — Unit Parameters and Testing Methods (expected project-specification reference)
IEC 62933-5-2 — Electrical Energy Storage Systems — Safety Requirements for electrochemical-based systems (expected project-specification reference)

summary.en: China BESS grid-connection documentation commonly relies on GB/T 36558-2023 for electrochemical energy storage systems in power systems, GB/T 34120-2023 for distribution-network connection, and NB/T 42090 for energy storage converter testing. These documents may support technical engineering review, but they are China domestic grid evidence. They are not substitutes for MEW or project-owner connection approval in Kuwait. China grid configuration is commonly 220/380 V at 50 Hz, so PCS voltage ranges, protection limits, transformer interfaces, earthing assumptions, and commissioning tests must be rechecked for Kuwait 240/415 V, 50 Hz conditions.
summary.zh: 中国BESS并网文件通常依据GB/T 36558-2023电力系统电化学储能系统通用技术条件、GB/T 34120-2023配电网接入技术规范，以及NB/T 42090储能变流器检测技术规程。这些文件可支持技术工程审查，但属于中国国内电网证据，不能替代科威特MEW或项目业主的并网批准。中国电网常见配置为220/380 V、50 Hz，因此PCS电压范围、保护限值、变压器接口、接地假设和调试测试均须按科威特240/415 V、50 Hz条件重新核查。
summary.zht: 中國BESS併網文件通常依據GB/T 36558-2023電力系統電化學儲能系統通用技術條件、GB/T 34120-2023配電網接入技術規範，以及NB/T 42090儲能變流器檢測技術規程。這些文件可支持技術工程審查，但屬於中國國內電網證據，不能替代科威特MEW或項目業主的併網批准。中國電網常見配置為220/380 V、50 Hz，因此PCS電壓範圍、保護限值、變壓器接口、接地假設和調試測試均須按科威特240/415 V、50 Hz條件重新核查。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 36558-2023 — 电力系统电化学储能系统通用技术条件 (General Technical Requirements for Electrochemical Energy Storage Systems in Power Systems)
GB/T 34120-2023 — 电化学储能系统接入配电网技术规范 (Technical Specification for Electrochemical Energy Storage System Connected to Distribution Network)
NB/T 42090 — 储能变流器检测技术规程 (Technical Code for Testing of Energy Storage Converters)

gap.en: Gap: China GB/T and NB/T grid evidence does not satisfy Kuwait MEW or project-owner acceptance by itself. Exporters should obtain written project-specific requirements from MEW or the project owner, confirm whether IEC 62933 evidence is required, configure PCS and protection functions for Kuwait's 240/415 V, 50 Hz supply, and plan local commissioning tests for grid protection, communication, and power-quality functions.
gap.zh: 差距：中国GB/T和NB/T并网证据本身不满足科威特MEW或项目业主验收。出口商应从MEW或项目业主取得书面项目专属要求，确认是否需要IEC 62933证据，按科威特240/415 V、50 Hz供电条件配置PCS和保护功能，并安排本地调试测试，覆盖电网保护、通信和电能质量功能。
gap.zht: 差距：中國GB/T和NB/T併網證據本身不滿足科威特MEW或項目業主驗收。出口商應從MEW或項目業主取得書面項目專屬要求，確認是否需要IEC 62933證據，按科威特240/415 V、50 Hz供電條件配置PCS和保護功能，並安排本地調試測試，覆蓋電網保護、通訊和電能品質功能。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory in practice for any grid-connected BESS — MEW and project-owner connection requirements must be satisfied; no public standalone Kuwait BESS grid code was confirmed as of dataset date
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory for grid-connected BESS in China under domestic grid/operator procedures; not transferable to Kuwait

source.publisher: Kuwait Ministry of Electricity, Water and Renewable Energy (MEW)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Chinese GB/T 36558-2023, GB/T 34120-2023, and NB/T 42090 evidence should be treated as engineering background only for Kuwait. MEW and the project owner should confirm the applicable connection requirements, IEC 62933 evidence, protection settings, and SCADA interface. Re-validate the PCS for Kuwait 240/415 V, 50 Hz operation before shipment or commissioning.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 中国GB/T 36558-2023、GB/T 34120-2023和NB/T 42090证据在科威特应仅作为工程背景。应由MEW和项目业主确认适用并网要求、IEC 62933证据、保护设置和SCADA接口。出货或调试前，应针对科威特240/415 V、50 Hz运行条件重新验证PCS。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 中國GB/T 36558-2023、GB/T 34120-2023和NB/T 42090證據在科威特應僅作為工程背景。應由MEW和項目業主確認適用併網要求、IEC 62933證據、保護設定和SCADA接口。出貨或調試前，應針對科威特240/415 V、50 Hz運行條件重新驗證PCS。
